distractor_plausibility.notes: 2 absurd distractors in q4 (spreadsheet engine and calculator app are too obviously unrelated to semantic AI). Absurd rate 13.3% is below the 25% fail threshold. Passes, but q4 distractors are weak and may reduce question discrimination for beginners.

coverage_map.lo_text: Define what a word embedding is and explain why plain text cannot be fed directly into an AI model.
Explain why one-hot encoding fails to capture meaning and how embeddings fix that problem.
Describe how a word embedding places related words close together in vector space.
Identify at least two real-world AI systems that rely on word embeddings.
Interpret a small embedding space by reading off which words are neighbours and what that neighbourhood implies about meaning.

objective_coverage.notes: Perfect 1:1 LO-to-question mapping. All 5 LOs covered; no orphan questions.

findings.question: q4
findings.detail: Two distractors — 'Spreadsheet formula engine' and 'Calculator app' — are too obviously unrelated to semantic AI for any student who has reached week 6. They reduce discrimination; stronger distractors would improve question quality (e.g., 'Spell-checker — flags words not found in its dictionary' or 'Translation memory — stores previous human translations for exact-match reuse').

beginner_scope.notes: Stems are plain-language and accessible. 'One-hot encoding' in q2 stem is corpus-defined vocabulary, not unjustified jargon. 'Dot product' in q2 stem is a prerequisite concept from topic 6.6, appropriate at this stage. All questions stay within the declared scope of topic 6.7. No out-of-scope questions detected. One soft unfair_distractor finding for q4.

verdict: PASS — all 5 checks pass. Positional distribution is balanced (max 40%, at threshold boundary but not exceeding it). Length bias affects 1/5 questions (20%), below the 25% fail threshold. Distractor plausibility passes with 2 absurd distractors out of 15 (13.3%), below the 25% threshold; q4 distractors are weak and flagged softly. All 5 LOs covered with no orphan questions. Beginner scope is clean with one soft unfair_distractor note on q4. No auto-correction applied.
